title: Investigate Three-Way Match Discrepancy
description: Document the discrepancy investigation and resolution; adjust invoice amount if applicable

discrepancy_type.title: Type of Discrepancy
enumNames: Price Difference — invoice price differs from PO
Quantity Mismatch — invoiced qty differs from received qty
Description Mismatch — item descriptions don't match
Missing Line Item — item on invoice not on PO
Tax / Shipping Included — PO excluded tax or shipping

discrepancy_description.title: Describe the Discrepancy
discrepancy_description.description: Detail what doesn't match and why

resolution_action.title: Resolution Action Taken
enumNames: Vendor Credited — vendor issued credit note
PO Amended — PO updated to match invoice
Short-Paid — paying only the PO amount
Accepted As-Is — variance within tolerance, approved
Escalated to Buyer — sent to buyer for resolution

adjusted_invoice_amount.title: Adjusted Invoice Amount ($)
adjusted_invoice_amount.description: Enter the corrected amount if the invoice was adjusted (leave blank to keep original)

resolution_notes.title: Resolution Notes
resolution_notes.description: Additional details, emails received, or contacts made
